mapper.select: select count(*) from board_like where board_like_review_no = #{boardReviewNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_like VALUES ( board_like_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardReviewNo}, #{memberId}, sysdate )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM board_like WHERE board_like_review_no = #{boardReviewNo} AND board_like_member_id = #{memberId}
